name: ExtensionEncounterHistory_Status
title: R5: planned | in-progress | on-hold | discharged | completed | cancelled | discontinued | entered-in-error | unknown
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EncounterHistory.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EncounterHistory.status` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EncounterHistory.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `Encounter.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `Encounter.status` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EncounterHistory.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Encounter.status` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `Encounter.status` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.

element.short: R5: planned | in-progress | on-hold | discharged | completed | cancelled | discontinued | entered-in-error | unknown
element.comment:

The target context `Encounter.status` is a modifier element, so this extension does not need to be defined as a modifier.
Note that internal business rules will determine the appropriate transitions that may occur between statuses (and also classes).
